# section1191.org

> Guide to Section 1191 -- consensual and nonconsensual plan confirmation in Subchapter V.

section1191.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://section1191.org/ -- Subchapter V plan confirmation overview
- https://section1191.org/plan-requirements.html -- Plan contents and requirements
- https://section1191.org/who-qualifies.html -- Eligibility for Subchapter V

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
